title: PlayerOrders
description: Let players create orders and complete them
body:
**Description**
PlayerOrders is a simple and effective plugin that allows players to create and deliver orders. 


How it works?
- A player creates an order which can be seen in Orders Menu and promise a reward which is taken when order is created. Then an another player collects wanted item and click on the order in Orders Menu. When is completed, ordered item comes to the vault of the sender of the order and player who have completed takes reward.


**Features**
- Item-based order system
- Vault economy support
- Order tracking & GUI interface
- Clean and optimized code
- Multi-language support (EN, TR)
- Customizable messages & GUI titles
- Config version tracking
- Developer-friendly API

  
**Dependencies**
- Vault (economy)


**Commands & Permissions**

```
/order create     - Create a new item order       - order.user
/order orders     - List orders                   - order.user
/order vault      - Open your vault               - order.user
/order myorders   - See your orders               - order.user
/order remove     - Remove your order             - order.user
```

 
**Developer API**
PlayerOrders includes a simple API for developers to integrate or extend functionality.
